name: Cloud Services
description: Managed cloud infrastructure spanning sovereign, private, hybrid, and hyperscaler environments — enabling regulated enterprises to consolidate multi-cloud estates under a single governance framework with guaranteed EU data residency, reducing vendor complexity and shifting infrastructure spend from capex to predictable managed-service opex.
positioning: Europe's only cloud integrator combining Deutsche Telekom sovereign infrastructure with certified AWS/Azure/GCP management under one governance roof — no other provider matches this breadth with BSI C5 and KRITIS compliance built in.
